selection_rule.sop_bench: Within the pinned GitHub archive, enumerate benchmark data directories in bytewise lexicographic order; retain directories containing sop.txt, tools.py, toolspecs.json, metadata.json, and test_set_with_outputs.csv; select the first retained directory. Within its CSV, select the first physical data row after the header.
selection_rule.anchor: Within the pinned official archive, enumerate task directory names in bytewise lexicographic order; retain directories containing instruction.md, environment/scenario_data.json, environment/setup_scenario.py, solution/optimal_plan.json, solution/solver.py, tests/checks.py, and task.toml; select the first retained directory.

sop_bench.row: first physical data row after header: aircraft_id a_00127
sop_bench.paper_release_timing: Pinned commit 2026-06-06 postdates immutable arXiv v2 updated 2026-02-23 by more than three months; release evidence is not paper-time byte identity.

anchor.paper_release_timing: Pinned commit 2026-05-26 postdates immutable arXiv v1 dated 2026-05-25 by one day; close release evidence is not assumed byte-identical to manuscript-time code.

scope: Exactly one package per released instrument. Selection is mechanical, not outcome-conditioned. No professional correctness, expert approval, capability, safety, production-fitness, or readiness claim is licensed.
